title: Assistant Mechanical Engineer - Diesel Engines (Tuas)
description:
Responsibilities:

  • Assist Engineer in coordinating and supervising maintenance and overhauling jobs
  • Dismantle and troubleshooting for Marine/Diesel Machineries/Equipment
  • Perform testing of equipment to ensure smooth operation
  • Prepare Job Acceptance on completion of Jobs
  • Monitor and update job status daily.
  • Supervise mechanical / diesel / air-conditioning works
  • Liaise with customers and contractors on works to be carried out
  • Arrange for inspection / job acceptance
  • Carry out general repair and maintenance jobs onboard vessels or in workshops
  • Dismantle and troubleshoot for mechanical defects
  • Perform testing of equipment to ensure smooth operation
  • Perform test run and report to superior on the job completion status

Requirements:

  • NTC/Diploma in Mechanical/Marine/Automotive related field.  
  • Possess basic understanding of basic components and functions of mechanical engines or diesel engines
  • Able to use IMTE tools such as Micrometer, Bore Gauge and Torque Wrench
  • Able to read simple drawings and service reports
  • Possess man management experience for up to 5 technicians
  • Willing to work under outdoor environment on site
  • Basic working knowledge in MS Word and Excel for status and reporting purpose

Other Information:

  • Location: Pioneer Sector (Daily Transportation Reimbursed To and Fro)
  • 5 days work week
  • Working Hours: 7.45am-5pm

postedCompany.description:
We provide innovative solutions in turnkey building, repair and conversion services for naval and commercial vessels and are one of the few shipyards in the world capable of supporting the entire lifecycle of a ship. Our shipyards in Singapore and the U.S. have established a strong track record in designing and building highly customised and technically sophisticated commercial and military vessels for customers worldwide.


Expanding on our core competencies in large scale engineering, we provide a comprehensive suite of environmental engineering solutions in water, wastewater, solid waste and renewable energy. A trusted partner to naval and commercial sector customers worldwide, our track record includes successfully delivered projects in Brunei, China, India, Thailand, Singapore, the Middle East and the U.S.
postedCompany.name: ST ENGINEERING MARINE LTD.
